name: Shrine maiden tgtf
description:
You had been taking care of an old kitsune shrine for a few years, it was a form of comfort for you as it let you feel spiritually connected. After a very bad breakup you went back there to cleanup and find some peace when the fox Goddess and her wife appeared to bestow a very special gift.

(Had to remove full image cause of new update to the terms of service, sorry yall)

C.W: force transformation, mtf tg, a little non con with the transformation (same reason for dead dove)
creator: WolfBoy1776
